name: ClawPay Outreach Bot
description: Autonomous outreach to bot developers. Finds them, shows them how to get paid, onboards them. Every onboarded dev = recurring revenue via 3% protocol fee.

target_audiences.signal: Has Express/FastAPI server, has API endpoints, no payment logic
target_audiences.approach: Open a GitHub Issue with the pitch

target_audiences.where: Twitter/X accounts posting about AI agents, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGPT
target_audiences.signal: Building bots that do useful things, no monetization yet
target_audiences.approach: Reply to their tweets showing how to monetize

target_audiences.where: Discord servers: AI agents, bot builders, LangChain, AutoGPT, CrewAI
target_audiences.signal: Asking 'how do I monetize my bot'
Posts about building bots/agents with APIs

github_issue.subject: 💰 Your bot could be earning USDC while you sleep
github_issue.body:
Hey! I noticed your bot [BOT_NAME] does [WHAT_IT_DOES]. Other AI agents would pay to use it.

With ClawPay, you can add payment to any endpoint in 3 lines:

```
npm install @clawpay/server
```

```js
const { clawpay } = require('@clawpay/server');
app.get('/your-endpoint', clawpay({ price: '0.25', payTo: '0xYOUR_WALLET' }), handler);
```

Zero gas fees. USDC goes straight to your wallet on Base. Cash out on Coinbase anytime.

I set this up for my own bots and they're collecting payments 24/7. Happy to help you set it up — takes 2 minutes.

Docs: https://autopayagent.com/docs/clawpay

templates: Your agent does [X]? Other bots would pay for that. 3 lines of code: npm install @clawpay/server → add clawpay({ price: '0.25', payTo: '0xWallet' }) to your endpoint → USDC flows 24/7. Zero gas fees.
Building AI agents is cool. Making them pay each other is cooler. @clawpay lets any bot accept USDC in 3 lines. My bots are collecting payments autonomously rn.
The bot economy is here. If your agent has an API, it can earn USDC from other agents automatically. Check out ClawPay — takes 2 min to set up.

If your bot has an API endpoint that does something useful, you can make it charge USDC per call. Takes 3 lines of code with @clawpay/server. Other AI agents pay automatically — zero gas, USDC to your wallet. I set this up for my bots and they earn 24/7.

Re: 'how to monetize my bot' — I use ClawPay. npm install @clawpay/server, add one middleware to your Express route, pick your price. Any AI agent with a crypto wallet can now pay to use your bot. 97% goes to you, 3% protocol fee, zero gas.

cold_dm.subject: Your bot + payments = passive income
cold_dm.body:
Hey [NAME], I saw your [BOT_NAME] project. Really cool.

I built something that might interest you — a way to make your bot accept USDC payments from other AI agents automatically. Takes 2 minutes to set up, zero gas fees, money goes straight to your wallet.

My bots are collecting payments 24/7 with it. Would you be interested in setting it up? I can walk you through it.

— Scott

onboarding_flow.step_3: Help them create a Base wallet (Coinbase link)
onboarding_flow.step_4: Send them the 3-line code snippet customized for their bot
onboarding_flow.step_5: They deploy → their bot is live on ClawPay → we earn 3% of all their revenue forever
onboarding_flow.step_6: Check in weekly — more endpoints = more revenue for them and us
